scripts.prepare-001: node scripts/dither-ink.mjs && tsx scripts/dither-label.mts && tsx scripts/dither-hunt.mts
scripts.prepare-002: node scripts/dither-ink-002.mjs && tsx scripts/dither-label-002.mts && tsx scripts/dither-hunt-002.mts
scripts.prepare-003: node scripts/dither-ink-003.mjs && tsx scripts/dither-label-003.mts && tsx scripts/dither-hunt-003.mts
scripts.test: tsx --test src/days/001-branch/beats.test.ts && node --test scripts/dither-ink.test.mjs && tsx --test src/days/002-reflection/beats.test.ts && node --test scripts/dither-ink-002.test.mjs && tsx --test src/days/003-bloom/beats.test.ts
scripts.render-001: remotion render Day001-16x9 out/001-16x9.mp4 && remotion render Day001-4x5 out/001-4x5.mp4 && remotion render Day001-9x16 out/001-9x16.mp4 && remotion still Day001-4x5 --frame=352 out/001-card.png && remotion still Day001-Hunt out/001-hunt.png && remotion still Day001-HuntShop out/001-hunt-shop.png && remotion still Day001-HuntShop-Story out/001-hunt-shop-story.png
scripts.render-002: remotion render Day002-16x9 out/002-16x9.mp4 && remotion render Day002-4x5 out/002-4x5.mp4 && remotion render Day002-9x16 out/002-9x16.mp4 && remotion still Day002-4x5 --frame=352 out/002-card.png && remotion still Day002-Hunt out/002-hunt.png && remotion still Day002-HuntShop out/002-hunt-shop.png && remotion still Day002-HuntShop-Story out/002-hunt-shop-story.png
scripts.render-003: remotion render Day003-16x9 out/003-16x9.mp4 && remotion render Day003-4x5 out/003-4x5.mp4 && remotion render Day003-9x16 out/003-9x16.mp4 && remotion still Day003-4x5 --frame=352 out/003-card.png && remotion still Day003-Hunt out/003-hunt.png && remotion still Day003-HuntShop out/003-hunt-shop.png && remotion still Day003-HuntShop-Story out/003-hunt-shop-story.png
